_comment: Full edit delegation cycle using envelope format for every message

step_1_handle._description: Orchestrator holds this envelope after artifact creation
step_1_handle.name: handle

step_2_projection._description: Orchestrator requests and receives a structure projection — an envelope
step_2_projection.name: projection

sections.label: Navigation
sections.summary: Top nav bar with logo, search, and user menu

sections.label: Statistics Cards
sections.summary: 4 stat cards: users (1,247), revenue ($12,340), orders (312), uptime (99.7%)

step_3_edit_intent._description: Orchestrator sends edit intent — an input envelope with parallel intents
step_3_edit_intent.name: intent

content.intent: Update the revenue stat card to show $15,720 and the orders count to 384

step_3_internal_dispatch._description: What happens inside the edit operation (not visible to orchestrator)

maintain_agent_context.system_prompt: You are a maintain-agent. Produce AAP diff envelopes to apply the requested change.
maintain_agent_context.artifact_injected: (full HTML content of dashboard-001 v3 — ~10,240 tokens)
maintain_agent_context.intent: Update the revenue stat card to show $15,720 and the orders count to 384

step_3_internal_dispatch.apply_engine: Resolves diff operations against stored v3 content → produces v4 (CPU, 0 tokens, ~2μs)

step_4_edit_result._description: Orchestrator receives result envelope — summary of changes + updated handle
step_4_edit_result.name: result

changes.description: Updated revenue from $12,340 to $15,720 and orders from 312 to 384

detail.intent: Update the revenue stat card to show $15,720 and the orders count to 384
